V

visit(Block) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForToWhileVisitor
Visits and transforms Block nodes by converting specific ForStatement nodes into WhileStatement structures.
visit(Block) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.LoopRewriterFirst
Rewrites a block by grouping statements according to previously attached control-flow annotations.
visit(BreakStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.FlowAnnotator
Processes a break statement and associates it with an auxiliary control flag if it appears inside a conditional context within a loop.
visit(BreakStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForEachMarkerVisitor
Visits break statements to process their enclosing loops.
visit(BreakStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForMarkerVisitor
Visits break statements to process their enclosing loops.
visit(ContinueStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.FlowAnnotator
Processes a continue statement and associates it with an auxiliary control flag if it appears inside a conditional context within a loop.
visit(ContinueStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForEachMarkerVisitor
Visits continue statements to process their enclosing loops.
visit(ContinueStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForMarkerVisitor
Visits continue statements to process their enclosing loops.
visit(DoStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.LoopRewriterFinal
Processes do-while loops that require flow rewriting.
visit(EnhancedForStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForEachToWhileVisitor
Visits EnhancedForStatement (for-each) nodes to perform their conversion into WhileStatement structures.
visit(TryStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ExceptionAnnotator
Traverses the "finally" block of a try statement to identify and mark break and continue statements.
visit(WhileStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.LoopRewriterFinal
Processes while loops that require flow rewriting.
